creator: jose@we.lc.ehu.es
text:
The port "net/ethereal" is configured to link with GTK 1.1d, but this
is not convenient now that GTK 1.2 is available.

Fix: Apply the following patch:

------------------------BEGIN--------------------------


-- JMA
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
José Mª Alcaide                         | mailto:jose@we.lc.ehu.es
Universidad del País Vasco              | mailto:jmas@es.FreeBSD.ORG
Dpto. de Electricidad y Electrónica     | http://www.we.lc.ehu.es/~jose
Facultad de Ciencias - Campus de Lejona | Tel.:  +34-946012479
48940 Lejona (Vizcaya) - SPAIN          | Fax:   +34-944858139
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
               "Go ahead... make my day." - H. Callahan--9GpEAx5mVGVF7Y0zb0eSqkB8jmyIChoWb2CS23h9KOCKMlU9
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- Makefile.orig       Tue Jan  5 14:49:59 1999
+++ Makefile    Fri Mar 12 15:05:06 1999
@@ -13,12 +13,12 @@
 
 MAINTAINER=    billf@FreeBSD.ORG
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=   gtk11d.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk11-devel
+LIB_DEPENDS=   gtk12.1:${PORTSDIR}/x11-toolkits/gtk12
 
 USE_X_PREFIX=  yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE= yes
-CONFIGURE_ENV= GTK_CONFIG="${X11BASE}/bin/gtk11d-config" \
-               GLIB_CONFIG="${LOCALBASE}/bin/glib11d-config"
+CONFIGURE_ENV= GTK_CONFIG="${X11BASE}/bin/gtk12-config" \
+               GLIB_CONFIG="${LOCALBASE}/bin/glib12-config"
 
 MAN1=          ethereal.1
 
---------------------- END ----------------------------
How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/net/ethereal; cat Makefile :-)
